name: HR Policy Q&A
description: Answers questions about Meridian HR policies: parental leave, PTO, benefits, code of conduct, performance management, and learning & development. Enterprise knowledge agent — open to all authenticated users, no coverage check required.

skills.name: get_policy_qa
skills.description: Retrieve Meridian HR policy details. Topics: parental_leave, pto, benefits, conduct, performance, learning. Enterprise agent — open to all staff.
examples: how many weeks of parental leave do I get
what is the maternity leave policy
how many PTO days do I have
what are my employee medical and dental benefits
what does the employee code of conduct cover
how do I report an ethics concern
how does the performance review work
what is the tuition reimbursement benefit
how many paid sick days do employees get
